---
name: Bug report
about: Report an error, inconsistency, or technical problem in the guidelines
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Where is the problem?
Link to the exact section, anchor, or file.

---

## What is wrong?
Describe the issue clearly (e.g. typo, broken link, incorrect citation, contradiction).

---

## Expected or correct behaviour
What should the guideline say or do instead?

---

## Suggested fix (optional)
If you know how to fix it, suggest the corrected text or link.

---

## Additional context
Anything else that might help us understand the issue.
